series_metadata.series_description: Applications, resumes, and related materials submitted by candidates responding to job vacancy announcements in the office of the Treasurer of State. Also includes records created by the agency used to evaluate such applications, to the extent that such records were created. Note that applications for posted job vacancy announcements are submitted through a website operated by the Department of Administrative Services (DAS), which is the agency responsible for storing this data. This record series also includes unsolicited resumes sent to the office by job-seekers not responding to a particular job vacancy announcement.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: from later of following: (a) date of receipt of resume or application or (b) date position is filled or an agency decision is made not fill position. ; Electronic: from later of following: (a) date of receipt of resume or application or (b) date position is filled or an agency decision is made not fill position
